nodes.label: AI as collaborative tool for professional writing
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to use AI more collaboratively than assigning it entire tasks

nodes.label: AI as confidence-building aid for novices
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that undermines personal achievement
nodes.grounding_span: My hope is that as I gain more experience and confidence in myself that I will feel the need to use AI less

nodes.label: AI reliability and truthfulness
nodes.grounding_span: I often challenge it with leading questions or alternative lines of thinking to ensure that it is not hallucinating or being misleading

nodes.label: AI as tool vs digital coworker
nodes.label_negative: AI as digital coworker performing bulk of work
nodes.grounding_span: as long as it is not performing the bulk of the work and is used as a tool rather than viewed as a digital coworker

nodes.label: Personal ownership of work product
nodes.grounding_span: part of me does regret using AI as it is not my own work and therefore not my own achievement

nodes.label: Professional competence and self-efficacy
nodes.grounding_span: My hope is that as I gain more experience and confidence in myself that I will feel the need to use AI less

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I want the document to reflect myself and my business

nodes.label: Accuracy and compliance
nodes.grounding_span: ensure that anything the AI has suggested I include complies with local regulations and legislations

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for efficient document creation
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to help me construct a letter of engagement, which was very helpful

nodes.label: Regret over diminished personal achievement
nodes.grounding_span: part of me does regret using AI as it is not my own work and therefore not my own achievement

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think AI is at a place yet where we should be entrusting it completely as it does tend to provide false information

nodes.label: Preference for self-reliance when capable
nodes.grounding_span: If I feel like I can complete a task by myself, for example an email or more recently a cover letter and resume, I will

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative refinement — writes drafts then improves with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I will typically write a draft documents then run it through AI to find areas I need to improve

nodes.label: Skeptical verification — challenges AI with leading questions
nodes.grounding_span: I often challenge it with leading questions or alternative lines of thinking to ensure that it is not hallucinating
